title: xyris spruceana
intro: Xyris spruceana, also known as the Yellow-eyed Grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Xyridaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The Yellow-eyed Grass has been found to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Xyris spruceana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
